title: Le congrès s'amuse
writer: Jean Boyer, Norbert Falk, Robert Liebmann
actors: Lilian Harvey, Lil Dagover, Henri Garat
plot: In 1815, while Napoleon was biting his brakes on the island of Elba, the Alliance met in Vienna around the Chancellor of Metternich. The whole city dances and the newly arrived Tsar Alexander courts the adorable flower girl Christel.
